author: Video Games Chronicle
text: A 16-game retro compilation of Barbie games is coming from Atari and Digital Eclipse Barbie Rewind will include a previously unreleased 16-bit title and a new Dreamhouse game

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Both Citizen Sleeper games are coming to Switch 2 later this month Players who own the Switch versions will be able to upgrade for free

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Story Rich Showcase: Here’s all 26 games shown during its debut presentation The new showcase focuses mainly on narrative-driven games

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Moomin: Midsummer Madness is a point-and-click adventure coming to Switch, Switch 2 and PC The game is described as "a playful, warm and family-friendly experience"

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Wholesome Direct: Here’s all 53 games featured in today’s cozy showcase The presentation focused on cozy and heartfelt games

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Southeast Asian Games Showcase: Here’s all 36 games shown in today’s presentation The presentation featured a host of games from studios located in Southeast Asia

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: IO Interactive reveals content roadmap for 007: First Light 007: First Light's first year of content updates has been announced.

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: A remaster of 2002 game Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee is reportedly coming this year It's being developed by its original studio Pipeworks and published by Atari, an insider claims

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Virtua Fighter Crossroads writers include David Hayter of Solid Snake fame and Persona staff The game is being made by Like a Dragon / Yakuza developer Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: 007: First Light sells 2.7 million copies in a week 007: First Light hits a new sales milestone after additional content is announced during Summer Game Fest.
